news.t: Amazon AI Bets Look Good for This ETF
Big Tech's AI Bets Pay Off: How to Play Latest Earnings
With Amazon Earnings Near, Consider These ETFs

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AMZN Bear 1X ETF (AMZD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Amazon stock. AMZD was launched on Sep 7, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Amazon AI Bets Look Good for This ETF
data.text: With shares of Amazon (AMZN) up 28% over the past month, it's safe to say investors are at peace with the company's massive artificial intelligence (AI) spending plans.
